Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-22T14-18-01-250Z/baseline-multi-file-rename-migration-1/repo/bench-targets/rename/src/format-user.mjs

@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function formatUserLabel(user) {
-  return user.email + '<' + user.name + '>'
+  return user.name + ' <' + user.email + '>'
 }

part.text: The implementation order is wrong. The test expects `'Ada <ada@example.com>'` (name first, then email in angle brackets). Let me fix the implementation:
